name: Omni Bot
description: The ultimate extension leveraging all SmartChat capabilities, featuring a dedicated bot, AI tool integration, and granular permissions.

commands.name: ping
commands.description: Verify the dedicated chat IPC bridge is operational

commands.name: test-tools
commands.description: List all dynamic AI tools currently registered by extensions

commands.name: test-contacts
commands.description: Retrieve the JID profile of the currently authenticated user

commands.name: test-chats
commands.description: Fetch and display a summary of your recent active chats

commands.name: test-ui
commands.description: Trigger an in-app toast and native OS desktop notification

commands.name: test-storage
commands.description: Demonstrate persistence by retrieving an SQLite activation counter

commands.name: test-scheduler
commands.description: Test background execution via an asynchronous delayed timer
